title: Mossel Bay's must-visit markets
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Looking to add something...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Looking to add something to a collection or get someone the perfect gift? Visit these markets in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Looking to add something to a collection or get someone the perfect gift? Visit these markets in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Night Market","html":"Mossel Bay Night Market"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Mossel Bay Night Market pops up for one night only each December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's night market will take place in Marsh Street from 15:00 until 22:00 on Friday 19 December. There will be plenty of stalls to peruse, ones offering products such as woodwork goods, handmade jewellery, toys, leather goods, hot foods and more.","html":"This year's night market will take place in Marsh Street from 15:00 until 22:00 on Friday 19 December. There will be plenty of stalls to peruse, ones offering products such as woodwork goods, handmade jewellery, toys, leather goods, hot foods and more."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hartenbos Street Market","html":"Hartenbos Street Market "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Hartenbos Street Market will take place in Kaap De Goede Hoop Avenue opposite the Walvissaal in Hartenbos from 15:00 until 22:00 on Monday 23 December.","html":"The Hartenbos Street Market will take place in Kaap De Goede Hoop Avenue opposite the Walvissaal in Hartenbos from 15:00 until 22:00 on Monday 23 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Similar to the Mossel Bay Night Market, stalls offering toys, jewellery and other handmade items will be on display.","html":"Similar to the Mossel Bay Night Market, stalls offering toys, jewellery and other handmade items will be on display."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hartenbos Gift Market","html":"Hartenbos Gift Market "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Also known as the Big White Tent, this is a large long-running market with over 500 exhibitions under one roof. The market opened on 22 November and will remain open until 4 January.","html":"Also known as the Big White Tent, this is a large long-running market with over 500 exhibitions under one roof. The market opened on 22 November and will remain open until 4 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tent is located at the Hart & Bosch Village and operates from 09:00 until 18:00 daily, except for Christmas Day.The Goods Shed"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Located in Bland Street, Mossel Bay, the Goods Shed is open throughout the whole year.","html":"Located in Bland Street, Mossel Bay, the Goods Shed is open throughout the whole year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During school holidays, the Goods Shed is open from 09:00 until 18:00 on Mondays to Sundays, while outside school holidays it is open on Tuesdays to Saturdays from 09:00 until 17:00, Sundays from 09:00 until 14:00 and closed on Mondays.The Towns House","html":"During school holidays, the Goods Shed is open from 09:00 until 18:00 on Mondays to Sundays, while outside school holidays it is open on Tuesdays to Saturdays from 09:00 until 17:00, Sundays from 09:00 until 14:00 and closed on Mondays.

The Towns House "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Towns House is situated in one of Mossel Bay's oldest buildings and houses the handiwork of artists and crafters local to Mossel Bay.","html":"The Towns House is situated in one of Mossel Bay's oldest buildings and houses the handiwork of artists and crafters local to Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Located in Market Street, Towns House is open weekly from 08:00 until 17:00 and 09:00 until 13:00 on Saturdays and public holidays."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Midbrak Mark","html":"Midbrak Mark "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A great Saturday morning outing for the whole family, complete with food, fresh produce from the farm, unique crafts and home-made products.","html":"A great Saturday morning outing for the whole family, complete with food, fresh produce from the farm, unique crafts and home-made products."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Midbrak Mark takes place at Brinkleys River Village in Little Brak River, every Saturday from 09:00 until 13:00.","html":"The Midbrak Mark takes place at Brinkleys River Village in Little Brak River, every Saturday from 09:00 until 13:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
